title: Pargod

title: Sliding Wall
description:
Oil on wood panel. as sliding wall
In the past year of 2019, as part of the exhibition work process, I have painted on wood panels, 240/120 cm each, to place them as sliding walls in the middle of the space, Painted on both sides.
